description: Python Backend: Implement the complete Python backend with IPC server, auth module, export engine, message fetcher, media downloader, HTML/JSON formatters, and the Jinja2 HTML template.
steps: Create python/core/config.py with constants: SESSION_DIR, CONFIG_DIR, EXPORTS_DIR paths (all under ~/.teleexport/), setup_dirs() function to create them

Create python/core/client.py with TeleExportClient class wrapping Telethon: init(api_id, api_hash), connect(), send_code(), sign_in(), sign_in_with_password(), get_me(), disconnect() methods as specified in the plan
Create python/core/auth.py with AuthManager class that handles the full auth flow: check_session, send_code, sign_in, check_2fa, sign_in_2fa, logout
Create python/core/session_manager.py for managing session files (list sessions, delete session, get session info)
Create python/ipc/protocol.py defining IPCMessage dataclass and serialization

Create python/ipc/server.py with IPCServer class: register() handlers, start() reading stdin line-by-line, send_event() for streaming, _handle_message() for JSON-RPC dispatch, _send_result(), _send_error()

Create python/ipc/handlers.py with register_handlers() function that registers all RPC methods: auth.check_session, auth.send_code, auth.sign_in, auth.check_2fa, auth.sign_in_2fa, auth.logout, chats.list, chats.get_details, export.start, export.cancel, export.get_status, settings.get, settings.set
Create python/export/progress.py with ExportProgress class for tracking and emitting progress events
Create python/export/message_fetcher.py with MessageFetcher class: iter_batches() using takeout session with fallback, count_total(), rate limiting as per plan
Create python/export/media_downloader.py with MediaDownloader class: download() with dedup via file_id cache, _generate_filename() with date prefix, size limit checking
Create python/export/chat_scanner.py with ChatScanner class: scan_all() using iter_dialogs, filter by type, return structured chat list
Create python/export/engine.py with ExportEngine class and ExportConfig dataclass: run(export_id) orchestrating full export, _export_chat() for single chat, _should_download_media(), _get_formatter()
Create python/formatters/html_formatter.py with HTMLFormatter class using Jinja2: format(), _group_by_date(), _collect_participants(), custom filters
Create python/formatters/json_formatter.py with JSONFormatter class: streaming JSON output using orjson
Create python/formatters/csv_formatter.py with CSVFormatter class for CSV export
Create python/formatters/templates/chat.html - the full HTML template with dark theme CSS from the plan (messenger-style bubbles, date separators, media rendering, responsive design, print styles)
Create python/formatters/templates/styles.css with the full CSS extracted (can be inlined by the formatter)
Create python/utils/sanitizer.py for HTML text sanitization
Create python/utils/file_utils.py with safe filename generation, directory creation helpers
Create python/utils/logger.py with configured logging (file + stderr)
Create python/utils/rate_limiter.py with RateLimiter class for Telegram API rate limits
Create python/main.py entry point: App class with server, client, run(), shutdown() as specified in the plan
acceptance_criteria: All Python modules import successfully without errors: python -c 'from python.main import App'
The IPC server can be instantiated and handlers registered
The ExportEngine, MessageFetcher, MediaDownloader classes are properly structured with correct method signatures
The HTML template renders valid HTML when given test data
pytest discovers and can run test files in tests/python/
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/teleexport && PYENV_VERSION=3.11.15 python -c 'import sys; sys.path.insert(0, "."); from python.ipc.server import IPCServer; s = IPCServer(); print("IPCServer OK")'
cd /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/teleexport && PYENV_VERSION=3.11.15 python -c 'import sys; sys.path.insert(0, "."); from python.core.client import TeleExportClient; print("Client OK")'
cd /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/teleexport && PYENV_VERSION=3.11.15 python -c 'import sys; sys.path.insert(0, "."); from python.export.engine import ExportEngine, ExportConfig; print("Engine OK")'
